label: Nullglow Servitorium
description: Nullglow Servitorium is a compact residence carved into the interlocked hab tiers of Vespera Tertius Nocturnis Bastion, its walls clad in black vitrified stone and slagcrete to blunt abrasive ashfall. Narrow slit-lamps and shielded vents regulate light and air against auroral backwash and electrostatic gusts, leaving the interior in a controlled, low-glare gloom. Built-in bunks, lockboxes, and a fold-down ration table are riveted directly to the structure, prioritizing stability under constant vibration from beacon pylons and relays. A recessed vox niche is overplated with scavenged wreck-plate shielding, reflecting the city’s permanent struggle against interference.
